name: Post-Construction Cleanup
description: Once your data center build is complete, we come in with our box truck and clean it up. Construction debris haul-off, sweep-out of the building, and trash removal from the site — so your team can walk into a clean facility ready for commissioning. Serving data center projects in the Iowa City corridor (Iowa City, Coralville, North Liberty).

faqs.question: What does your post-construction cleanup include?
faqs.answer: We haul construction debris off-site, sweep out the building, and remove trash and leftover materials. Straightforward post-build cleanup — we get the space ready for the owner to walk in.

faqs.question: How do you haul the debris away?
faqs.answer: We use our own box truck. One contractor, one truck, in and out — no waiting on third-party dumpster pickups or extra subcontractors.

faqs.question: Do you work on QTS, Google, or other large data center sites?
faqs.answer: Yes. We're available as a cleanup subcontractor for data center projects across the Iowa City and Cedar Rapids corridors.

faqs.question: How do I get a quote?
faqs.answer: Call the office and ask for Mohamed at (641) 451-3132, or email cleanup@freightbridgellc.com. He'll book a site walk-through with our crew and get a flat price back to you.

seo.title: Post-Construction Cleanup for Data Centers | Iowa City
seo.description: Box-truck post-construction cleanup for data center projects in Iowa City, Coralville, and North Liberty. Debris haul-off and site cleanup. Call (641) 451-3132.
